name: integration_ph_launch_gentlelimit_mindful_screen_
method: [PH LAUNCH] GentleLimit: Mindful screen time for macOS without blocking apps

phases.name: intel_gather
steps: playwright scrape GentleLimit PH page: upvote count, comments, maker profile, pricing
extract commenter profiles: HN/Twitter handles, job titles, pain points from comments

phases.name: asset_build
steps: engagement_bait_converter.py: 3 tweets on mindful vs blocking screen time debate

phases.name: distribution
steps: stage qualified PH commenters into OUTBOUND cold email pipeline
post PH comment on GentleLimit page (helpful, no spam) linking to our app
